messaging.title: Message Roles Configuration
messaging.subtitle: Configure which roles are allowed in chat messages. Core roles can be hidden but not deleted (they remain valid for backend validation).
messaging.infoMessage: These roles will be available when creating chat messages. Each role can have a custom emoji for visual identification. Core roles can be hidden but not deleted (they remain valid for backend validation).
messaging.emojiHelper: Single emoji character for visual identification
messaging.npcCountHelper: Choose how many clones of this role should appear in SwarmDesk (0-5).
messaging.npcColorHelper: Used for the NPC body glow and sidebar identity color.
messaging.npcRoleHelper: Shown above the NPC in SwarmDesk. Leave blank to use the display label.
messaging.npcPersonalityHelper: Controls the default vibe and fallback dialogue for this NPC.
messaging.duplicateRoleId: A lab procedure with this designation already exists.
messaging.duplicateAgentId: A test subject with this ID is already in the database.

welcome.title: Welcome to Cyan Lab
welcome.description: Inventorium is your AI-powered research and project visualization platform.
welcome.subtitle: Let's initialize the system tour to help you get started.

projects-overview.title: Research Projects
projects-overview.description: Organize your tasks into projects for optimized workflow management and data visualization.
projects-overview.hint: 💡 System Tip: Every task can belong to a project

create-project.title: Initialize New Project
create-project.description: Let's initialize a project to organize your research. Projects help you group related tasks together.
create-project.step1: Click the floating '+' button in the bottom right corner
create-project.step2: Select the 'Project' tab in the interface
create-project.step3: Enter a unique project ID (lowercase with hyphens, e.g., 'cyber-protocol-01')
create-project.step4: Add a display name and technical description
create-project.hint: Tip: Project IDs must be unique and use lowercase letters with hyphens

add-todo.title: Add Task to Protocol
add-todo.description: Now let's add a task to your project. These are the actionable items in your workflow.
add-todo.step2: Select the 'Task' tab in the interface
add-todo.step4: Select your project from the dropdown
add-todo.hint: Tip: You can generate tasks from any system module using the '+' button

configure-ai.title: Initialize AI Protocol Assistant
configure-ai.description: Enhance system efficiency by integrating an AI provider such as Google Gemini or OpenAI.

benefits.enhance: Augment task directives with intelligent analysis

configure-ai.statusConfigured: Status: ✅ AI assistant initialized and operational!
configure-ai.helpText: AI assistant can be initialized anytime via Settings → AI Configuration

ai-assistant.title: AI Research Assistant
ai-assistant.description: Leverage the AI assistant to manage protocols, analyze data patterns, and optimize productivity.
ai-assistant.hint: 💡 System Tip: Click the chat interface to initiate communication

swarmdesk.description: Explore your codebase in 3D with SwarmDesk - an immersive data visualization tool.

swarmdesk.tabTip: After workspace initialization, press TAB to switch between dashboard and 3D environment

instructions.title: How to use:
instructions.step1: Install the UML generator: npm install -g @madnessengineering/uml-generator
instructions.step2: Generate UML from your codebase: uml-generator /path/to/project -o project-uml.json
instructions.step3: Upload the generated JSON file using the button above
